title: Potion Enchantments
description: A mod which adds Potion and Beacon Effects like Haste, Fire Resistance etc as Enchantments. Even Luck too.
body:
### **Update for the Mod. Please Read Changelog.**                                                              
Hi Everyone. I today brought to you a complete changed and redesigned version of this mod. I have completely changed the way how this mod was made. This is mod is now data driven because of how Mojang changed the enchantments to be data driven. All the Enchantments work exactly the same as they were. I also added the Saturation enchantment from my mod [The TechnoBlade](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-technoblade) in this mod too. The Enchantments being data driven now also made it possible for me to make this mod for all mod loaders too except forge. This mod is now much more cleaner too. This mod is also available as datapack too. No any type of resourcepack required.



### **Outdated Discription**                                                                                                            
Hi                                                                                                            
This Mod adds 10 Potions and Beacon Effects as Enchantments.                                             
Which are Speed, Strength, Resistance, Fire Resistance, Regenration, Luck, Jump Boost, Haste, Water Breathing, Slow Falling.
![Action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c4d0598151110664ad7a565f201caaebafff399_0.webp)
As You can see in the Image all Enchantments give effects of Level 4.(Except for Fire Res, Water Breathing and Slow Falling)                                                                         But it comes with a cost of Levels. Each Book costs 30 Level to be applied.                                        ![Cost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20adb5246d89af23b5b754f0a2596b57c6658d70_0.webp)
They can only be obtained from Villagers. No Enchanting Table and Structures                            
Now there is only one issue with this mod :-                                                           
You have to use this with any Anvil Improvment Mod which uncaps the anvil cost or limits the cost  or reduces the cost BCZ with Vanilla Anvil, Anvil will say TOO EXPANSIVE after combining 4 books.  
OR                                                                                                        
Alternatively You can use it with Enchanting Table Mods Like "[Enchanting Infuser](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enchanting-infuser-forge)" or "[Dark Enchanting](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dark-enchanting)" BCZ with these U dont have to use the Anvil and you can apply the enchantments easily. But they are not Updated to 1.21.1 Neoforge (as of writing this December 8, 2024). I did made this mod to be used with these table mods.            

You can use this mod with my other mods you can chech out on my Profile.
You can also suggest me any simple but functional mod ideas in my discord server.                
BTW my next mod will be a New Armor and Tools one so stay updated.                                                                                                                                      Bye :).
